name: Flavored Butters
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together well.
2. Mix together well.
3. Toast the pecans in a 350°F oven for about 8 minutes; let them cool.
4. Chop the toasted pecans finely.
5. Beat the butter until fluffy, then beat in the honey until well combined.
6. Mix in the chopped pecans. If made ahead, cover and refrigerate. Let stand at room temperature to soften before serving.
We had a brunch potluck at work and I made 4 or 5 different breads with the assorted butters - they make yummy toast!
